{{Quote|I don't believe you've met my pet vornskyrs, Councilor. This one's named Drang; the somewhat more aloof one there is Sturm.|Talon Karrde|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Drang''', along with [[Sturm]], was one of [[Talon Karrde]]'s two pet [[vornskr]]s.

Karrde encountered Drang pinned in one of his [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] base's perimeter traps. Having already learned from Sturm that removing a vornskr's venomous tail will curb its aggressive tendencies, Karrde tranquilized Drang and bobbed its tail. When Drang recovered, Karrde was able to train him easily. Karrde brought Drang and Sturm to Mount Tantiss, in hopes that they could locate [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] using their Force-related hunting technique.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The name, along with Drang, was a reference to [[Wikipedia:Sturm und Drang|''Sturm und Drang'']], an eighteenth-century German literary movement emphasizing struggles of the individual against society, something which author [[Timothy Zahn]] felt would appeal to Karrde as an educated, pun-loving sort.<ref name="Heir 20">''[[Heir to the Empire: The 20th Anniversary Edition]]''</ref>
